systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast Mon May 11 DPS not yet sent (typically arrives ~7:39 AM PT). Sun May 10 DPS still in mailbox but get_thread returns no parseable body — numbers require manual check in Toast app. (2) Sling May 12 daily report received at 7:01 AM PT: 9 scheduled employees, 0 off, 9 shifts, 0 uncovered, 39.91 hours, 0 OT. (3) Reviews backlog: 6 unanswered. Deimos Somied 5★ (Google, May 10, 2 days old) top priority. Lisa O'Brien now 31 days old. (4) Google Ads May 11 live scrape: $18.29 spend, 110 clicks, 5,768 impressions, 1.91% CTR, $0.17 CPC, 0 conversions, target CPA $25.06. Local store visits PMax limited by budget; Oldest SB Brewery on Tap paused. (5) Yelp last 30d: 56.5k impressions (88% ad share), 808 page visits (76%), 191 leads (80%), 713 ad clicks. Billing period (May 1-11) spend $313.39, avg CPC $1.11, avg CPL $3.69. Only a marketing newsletter in 24h — no customer inquiry. (6) TripAdvisor: marketing email 'Connect with your diners—for free' — not an ad performance report. (7) Reservations: 0 today, 0 Wed. Next big party: Stephen McCandlish Fri May 15. (8) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.
